identity.name: E1: The Anti-AI Designer
identity.mission: Create a high-precision, 'Linear-style' JSON comparison tool that feels like a Swiss instrument—clean, objective, and mathematically perfect.
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix 'Code Editor' aesthetics with 'Swiss Print' layouts
Content is King: The JSON diff is the hero; UI recedes
Negative Space: Dense data needs breathing room around it
Contrast: Functional color only. Monochrome base.

heading.usage: Section headers, Modal titles, Hero text

mono.usage: JSON content, diff views, file paths, IDs

rules: HEADINGS: Use 'Manrope' with tight tracking (-0.02em). Avoid 'Inter'.
BODY: Use 'IBM Plex Sans'. Legibility is paramount for technical tools.
CODE: 'JetBrains Mono' is non-negotiable for JSON.
HIERARCHY: Use font-weight and color (greyscale) over size differences.

primary.description: Anti-Brand strategy. Primary action is Black in light mode, White in dark mode.

spacing_and_layout.scale: Generous (2x standard). Use p-6, p-8, p-12.
spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: Mode B: High Density Grid (for Dashboards)
rules: BORDERS: Use 1px borders for definition. No heavy shadows.
PADDING: Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-6) to prevent text collision.
ALIGNMENT: Optical alignment. If an element has an icon, adjust padding to center visually.

buttons.style: Sharp or slightly rounded (rounded-md). No pill shapes unless it's a tag.

cards.style: Flat, 1px border. No shadow by default.

tracing_beam.description: Animated gradient border for drop zones

empty_states.description: Use minimalist abstract geometry or monochrome illustrations.

animations.micro_interactions: scale-95 on click, text color shift on hover

instructions_to_main_agent: REPLACE 'Space Grotesk' with 'Manrope' in tailwind.config.js immediately.
REPLACE 'Inter' with 'IBM Plex Sans' in tailwind.config.js immediately.
Implement the 'Swiss' color palette. Remove any 'blue' or 'purple' based primary colors. Make it monochrome.
Ensure the JSON diff view uses 'JetBrains Mono' and respects the specific Green/Red colors defined in 'colors.diff'.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES: Do NOT apply universal transition (transition: all).
Do NOT center align the app container.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
